title: Career Hotline: Zozie Identity Decontamination + Free Tier

deposits.summary: Webhook: persona prepend, Zozie name/firstMessage/voicemail, BOOKING_LINK→CAREERSPAN_URL, requestCareerSession msgs fixed, Zozie keyword added
System prompt: identity line→Zozie, all V refs replaced (escalation, contact collection, contrarian views header, requestEscalation desc)
Value prop tree: all 5 CTAs fixed (V will→Careerspan team), booking→mycareerspan.com, first-person pitch voice removed, soft close fixed
Career stages: 5x V's coaching angle→Coaching angle, V's philosophy→Careerspan. Diagnostic: 4 V refs fixed. Tool specs: 2 descriptions rewritten
74 Vrijen attributions decontaminated across 11 extracted concept files via Python batch + manual cleanup. Zero non-biographical Vrijen refs remain

15-min free tier: caller_balances table, getCallerBalance/updateCallerBalance functions, balance check in assistant-request (rejects at 0), balance context injected into system prompt, low-balance warning at 3min, maxDurationSeconds capped to remaining, end-of-call balance tracking

Service restarted, health check passes. Verification: zero V identity refs in coaching content, persona prepended, balance context injected, maxDuration=900s (15min), name=Zozie. One additional V ref found and fixed (public contact info header). Ready for live call test.

learnings.lesson: Task subagents with Edit tool don't persist file changes to disk. File edits from background agents are sandboxed. Must do edits from main context or use bash-based tools.

Background Task subagents with Edit tool do NOT persist file changes to disk. Their edits are sandboxed. Always do file edits from the main context, or use bash-based tools (python scripts, sed) from subagents.
